title: Restart cockpit backend - pick up task-history fix
description: Pull latest origin/main into the mide-pilot clone and restart the cockpit FastAPI backend so it loads the updated runtime.py (git archive fix for get_task_history). Steps: cd /home/larieladmin/mide-pilot && git pull --ff-only origin main && systemctl --user restart cockpit-backend 2>/dev/null || pkill -f 'uvicorn.*main:app' && sleep 3 && verify /api/status/task-history returns count > 0.
